creator: chandler@chapman.edu
text:
I attempted to recreate this bug on another server and was unsuccessful. I presume this was due to a misconfiguration on my original box. My apologies for any inconvenience.

-- 
Jay Chandler
Network Administrator
Chapman University

-----Original Message-----

From:  Gabor Kovesdan <gabor@FreeBSD.org>
Subj:  Re: ports/104546: net/nss_ldap bug
Date:  Tue Dec 26, 2006 12:49 pm
Size:  330 bytes
To:  bug-followup@FreeBSD.org; chandler@chapman.edu; Artem Kazakov <kazakov@gmail.com>  

Dear Submitter and Maintainer,

we don't have any patch here in the trail of this PR. If you have a 
patch that fixes this issue, could you please send it to us? If it was 
just overlooked and no patch is available, could you please test if this 
issue still exist with an up-to-date ports tree?

Thanks in advance,
Gabor Kovesdan
